deficit: Primary mapped manuscript is 98,529 words, below the 100,000-word final invariant.
award_readiness_impact: Awards should receive the finished book, not a near-miss draft.
next_fix: Add targeted prose where source-density and narrative continuity are weak, not filler.

deficit: Visual program still misses the 100-exhibit floor by at least 10 ready exhibits.
award_readiness_impact: Design-forward nonfiction juries and reviewers will see the book as unfinished if figures remain placeholder-heavy.
next_fix: Promote at least 10 rights-screened candidates into ready status and then render-test captions.

award_readiness_impact: Prize submissions cannot carry known unresolved factual claims.
next_fix: Close or cut each needs-verification claim before any entry packet.

deficit: Eleven chapters are critical source-density risks.
award_readiness_impact: Thin source adjacency weakens judge confidence and reviewer trust.
next_fix: Repair critical chapters first, placing citations beside factual paragraphs.

deficit: Seven additional chapters are thin source-density risks.
award_readiness_impact: Even non-critical thin chapters create uneven authority across the spine.
next_fix: Add primary/secondary corroboration and reduce unsupported synthesis.

deficit: Chapter 12 still has a structural conflict.
award_readiness_impact: An unresolved mid-book architecture problem makes the whole work feel less inevitable.
next_fix: Run a dedicated Chapter 12 structure decision pass before final copyedit.

deficit: No final full-book PDF/render QA has passed.
award_readiness_impact: Award packets and ARC review require stable pagination, captions, notes, and interior design.
next_fix: Render the complete book and log layout, caption, note, and orphan/widow QA.

award_readiness_impact: Permissions uncertainty can block publication and award submission after the editorial work is done.
next_fix: Create a quote-permission ledger and replace risky quotations with paraphrase where necessary.

deficit: Screenshot/photo rights remain acquisition-planning, not final clearance.
award_readiness_impact: Visual-rich entries need clean provenance and publication rights.
next_fix: Convert priority screenshot/photo candidates into final assets with rights/credit/license rows.

deficit: Chapters 3 and 4 have zero ready visual exhibits in the current readiness path.
award_readiness_impact: Early technical chapters need visual assistance for judges and reviewers.
next_fix: Prioritize simple, rights-clean technical diagrams or source-surface exhibits for Chapters 3-4.

deficit: Market, adoption, infrastructure, and reception lanes still need more secondary/context corroboration.
award_readiness_impact: Business/general nonfiction awards reward interpretation that is externally situated, not just primary-source-heavy.
next_fix: Add trade press, analyst, academic, and critic context where claims lean too close to vendor/platform sources.

deficit: Cover, jacket, and interior design are not final.
award_readiness_impact: Award and critic first impressions begin with professional packaging.
next_fix: Commission or design final cover/interior test pages after manuscript QA clears.

deficit: Review/blurbs/ARC pipeline is only planned, not built.
award_readiness_impact: NBCC, LA Times, and commercial discovery lanes depend on critics and reviewers seeing the book in time.
next_fix: Build reviewer list, ARC schedule, blurb targets, and outreach copy.

deficit: Title/subtitle and metadata still need reader testing.
award_readiness_impact: Wrong positioning can make a strong book invisible to the right category.
next_fix: Run title/subtitle tests and freeze metadata before ARC generation.

deficit: No award-specific calendar owner or evidence folder exists yet.
award_readiness_impact: Deadlines are unforgiving; missing formats or portals can waste a finished book.
next_fix: Create an award evidence folder with source URLs, deadlines, portal notes, material checklists, and reminders.
